appName.message: G-web - Personalized New Tab and Pet Assistant

appDesc.message: Turns the new tab page into a personalized dashboard with cat interactions, music detection, quick panels, and more.

video_unsupported.message: Your browser does not support the video tag.

drag_hint.message: Hold the title bar area to drag this panel.

wp_tip_content.message:
🌟 What wallpaper types are available?

You can switch between static images, smooth videos, and interactive web wallpapers. You can also upload your own custom wallpaper.

✨ What is background parallax?

When enabled, the background gently follows your mouse movement,

making the page feel deeper, livelier, and more playful.

🌊 What is the water ripple effect?

It makes static wallpapers ripple softly like water. It is soothing, but it can use more GPU power, so choose based on your machine.

Tip: this effect only works on static wallpapers.

Try things out and dress up the page beautifully.

Nomi   says

birthday_surprise.message: Nomi prepared a little surprise for you. Take a look

contra_controls.message: Controls: WASD move | J shoot | K jump | Shift select | Enter start

mario_controls.message: Controls: WASD move | J run/fireball | K jump | Shift select | Enter start

welcome_intro.message: For the best experience, please finish these basic settings:

welcome_gpu_desc.message: Settings → System and performance → Enable graphics acceleration

welcome_edge_title.message: 2. Turn off the Edge hover bar

welcome_edge_desc.message: Settings → Appearance → Context menus → Turn off video quick actions

welcome_features.message:
🤖 Built-in AI and retro games
🔍 Recommended zoom 90%
Right-click to customize
📂 Hideable sidebars

copyright_body.message:
The wallpapers in this extension come from Wallpaper Engine Workshop, Zhutix, and Pinterest. Copyright belongs to the original creators. This extension is for personal, non-commercial recommendation only. If you are an original creator and want content adjusted, please contact me.

The wallpapers are cropped for personal viewing and non-commercial use only. Profit-making use, resale, reposting, AI training, and similar uses are prohibited.

Respect and thanks to every original creator. If you enjoy these works, please follow the links in the lower-left corner of each wallpaper and support the source.

zen_hint_tip.message: These shortcuts only control the music player in the right panel, not music from external websites.

wallpaper_custom_hint.message:
💡 Click the button above to upload a local image or video (MP4).
It will be applied automatically and saved in the browser cache.

image_mode_on_title.message: Image generation mode (click to return to chat)

image_open_title.message: Click to open the original image in a new tab

image_error.message: Image generation failed. Try another prompt or come back later.

chat_welcome.message: Hi! I am Nomi, your AI assistant. What can I help with?

confirm_clear_chat.message: Clear all chat history and memory?

engine_switch_replies_2.message: Let us see which search result is smarter.

search_focus_prompts_1.message: What would you like to search?

search_focus_prompts_3.message: Type a keyword and I will help.

birthday_special_1.message: Happy birthday! 🎂 Today is your day. Enjoy it!

birthday_special_2.message: Happy birthday! 🎉 Make a wish and I will guard it.

birthday_special_3.message: Happy Birthday! ✨ Wishing you a wonderful year ahead.

greeting_morning_replies_3.message: Morning. Let us start with energy.

greeting_noon_replies_3.message: Take a small break at noon.

greeting_afternoon_replies_2.message: Afternoons are perfect for a little reset.

greeting_afternoon_replies_3.message: Maybe coffee, tea, and a quiet moment.

greeting_evening_replies_2.message: You worked hard today. Rest early.

time_greetings_2.message: It is noon. Remember to eat.

time_greetings_3.message: Afternoon is a good time for a quick rest.

time_greetings_4.message: It is late. Try to rest soon.

todo_added_1.message: Got it. I wrote it down.

weather_sunny_1.message: The weather is lovely. Maybe get some sun.

weather_cloudy_1.message: A gray day. Good for staying cozy.

weather_rainy_1.message: It is raining. Remember an umbrella.

weather_rainy_2.message: Rain sounds can be very calming.

weather_sand_1.message: Dusty outside. Keep the windows closed.

weather_sand_2.message: The air looks rough. A mask may help.

weather_sand_3.message: Take care of your lungs today.

weather_snow_1.message: It is snowing. A quiet white day.

weather_unknown_2.message: Whatever the weather, I am here.

bili_hover_1.message: This is the author's Bilibili page.

bili_hover_2.message: There is also a Bilibili corner here.

bili_hover_3.message: Nice find. That is the Bilibili entrance.

youtube_hover_1.message: This is the author's YouTube page.

youtube_hover_2.message: YouTube has a trace of me too.

search_fun_phrases_3.message: What should I eat for lunch?

about_messages_1.message: The author is hiding somewhere near the edge of the screen.

about_messages_2.message: Try moving your mouse around the corners. Something may happen.

about_messages_3.message: Look around the edges. Finding it counts as a win.

about_messages_4.message: The author is shy. Try catching him near the screen edge.

tsundere_ai_1.message: What is it? Do not poke me for nothing.

tsundere_ai_2.message: Want me to draw? Fine, but no complaining.

tsundere_ai_3.message: Fine, I will help you this once.

zen_care_messages_1.message: You have been looking at the screen for a while. Blink and drink water.

zen_care_messages_2.message: Spacing out? I will keep you company.

zen_care_messages_3.message: Take a deep breath and relax your shoulders.

zen_care_messages_4.message: Stand up and stretch for a moment.

zen_care_messages_5.message: Time moves fast. Rest your eyes a little.

zen_care_messages_6.message: I am here with you. Remember to balance work and rest.

zen_care_messages_7.message: Eyes feeling tired? Look into the distance.

zen_care_messages_9.message: Daydreaming is a good kind of rest.

zen_care_messages_10.message: You have held that posture for a while. Move your neck a bit.

zen_care_messages_12.message: Being in your own quiet world can feel wonderful.

zen_care_messages_13.message: I like sharing quiet moments like this with you.

zen_care_messages_14.message: Do you hear a favorite rhythm? Sway along gently.

zen_care_messages_15.message: Let the worries go for now. This is your relaxing time.

zen_care_messages_16.message: This atmosphere is perfect for closing your eyes.

zen_care_messages_17.message: Pause whenever you feel tired. I will be here.

zen_care_messages_19.message: Drink some warm water and keep enjoying the moment.

zen_care_messages_20.message: I am saving this cozy feeling in my heart.

dynamic_pet_click_2.message: Let us do our best today.

dynamic_pet_click_5.message: Do not be too hard on yourself.

dynamic_pet_click_7.message: I am cheering for you nearby.

dynamic_pet_click_8.message: If you are tired, drink some warm tea and unwind.

dynamic_pet_click_9.message: Step outside when you can and get some air.

dynamic_pet_click_10.message: Share happy things with me anytime.

dynamic_pet_click_11.message: Drink water and take care of yourself.

dynamic_pet_hide_1.message: I will step away for a bit. Call me when needed.

dynamic_pet_hide_5.message: I am taking a tiny break. Call me when you need me.
